2606.14283.title: DIFF-ERO: A Conformance-Aware Loss for Deep Learning in Process Mining
2606.14283.paper_summary: Deep learning has driven many recent advances in process analytics, especially for predictive and prescriptive monitoring. However, standard objectives such as cross-entropy optimize local next-step likelihoods and only implicitly capture control-flow structure. As a result, models can achieve high token-level accuracy while permitting imprecise global behaviour. We introduce DIFF-ERO, a conformance-aware loss function for deep learning models on process data. DIFF-ERO is a differentiable formulation of entropy-based stochastic conformance that incorporates control-flow information during training. Our approach constructs batch-level stochastic transition matrices with soft edge memberships, allowing structural precision and recall signals to directly inform backpropagation. The loss is model-agnostic and can be applied whenever the final representation parametrizes stochastic transitions. We instantiate DIFF-ERO in transformer encoder-decoder pipelines for next-activity prediction and use it jointly with cross-entropy to analyse its theoretical components with respect to convergence. Across benchmarks comparing other loss functions and targets, DIFF-ERO shows improved predictive performance where structure matters most while maintaining parity elsewhere. At the same time, the learned stochastic automaton converges towards the structural ground truth, indicating that the network internalizes process model structure.
2606.14283.paper_summary_zh: 深度學習推動了過程分析的許多近期進展，特別是在預測和處方監控方面。<lb/>然而，標準目標如交叉熵優化局部下一步的可能性，並且僅隱式捕捉控制流結構。<lb/>因此，模型可以在允許不精確的全局行為的同時實現高的標記級準確性。<lb/>我們引入了DIFF-ERO，一種針對過程數據的深度學習模型的符合度感知損失函數。<lb/>DIFF-ERO是一種可微分的基於熵的隨機符合度的公式，並在訓練過程中納入控制流信息。<lb/>我們的方法構建了具有軟邊緣成員資格的批量級隨機轉移矩陣，允許結構精度和召回信號直接告知反向傳播。<lb/>該損失函數與模型無關，並且可以在最終表示參數化隨機轉移時應用。<lb/>我們在Transformer編碼器-解碼器管道中實現了DIFF-ERO，用於下一活動預測，並將其與交叉熵共同使用，以分析其理論組成部分與收斂的關係。<lb/>在比較其他損失函數和目標的基準測試中，DIFF-ERO在結構最重要的地方顯示出改進的預測性能，同時在其他地方保持平衡。<lb/>與此同時，學習到的隨機自動機向結構的真實情況收斂，這表明網絡內化了過程模型結構。
2606.14283.author: Johannes De Smedt et.al.
2606.14283.authors: Johannes De Smedt, Jari Peeperkorn, Artem Polyvyanyy, Jochen De Weerdt
